description_long: This is a large, multi-story office building with a rectangular footprint and a modern, utilitarian design. The main structure features a grid of evenly spaced windows set within a light-colored facade, giving it a repetitive and orderly appearance. The building has a prominent flat roof with a patterned surface, and a smaller, attached wing with fewer floors and larger window groupings. There are visible signs in a non-Latin script on the upper facade, indicating the building's name or function. The entrance is recessed and marked by a dark doorway at the base of the taller section. The overall aesthetic is functional and institutional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A tall, modern office building with a grid of windows, flat roof, and attached lower wing. The facade is light-colored with visible signage and a recessed entrance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main grid-window facade and the attached lower wing with larger windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall, plain facade with vertical window strips and signage near the top.
description_view_2: Direct front view emphasizing the regular window grid, main entrance, and signage above the doorway.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the vertical window arrangement, signage, and the connection to the lower wing.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows across the main facade; side wing has larger, grouped windows.
